view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not confirm the existence of the necessary components to validate the persona scenario regarding rate limiting on public pages. Specifically, there is no evidence of an Instagram Business account with booking integration, nor is there confirmation of a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook, which are critical for the scenario to be executed. As such, the validation step is blocked as it lacks the necessary information to assert a definitive conclusion.
